summary: Phase 2 Safeguarding Flow Testing Complete - All features verified. Staff portal code has data-session-id attribute, backend includes session_id in incoming_chat_request events, and frontend correctly passes sessionId to live-chat navigation.

test_credentials.note: sharon user was created during testing as it didn't exist

seed_data_creation: Created user sharon@radiocheck.me with role 'counsellor' for staff portal access
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 safeguarding flow is complete. All code implementations verified: 1) Staff portal app.js has data-session-id attribute on safeguarding cards (line 1264), 2) acceptPendingChatFromAlert function exists (line 1334), 3) Backend webrtc_signaling.py includes session_id in incoming_chat_request events (line 585), 4) Frontend chat screens pass sessionId to live-chat navigation. Live-chat page correctly receives params and makes socket connection.

features_tested.staff_portal_login: PASS - sharon@radiocheck.me login working after user creation
features_tested.safeguarding_alerts_api: PASS - API returns session_id field in alerts
features_tested.data_session_id_attribute: PASS - Staff portal app.js has data-session-id attribute in renderSafeguardingAlerts
features_tested.accept_pending_chat_from_alert: PASS - Function exists and is wired to onclick handler
features_tested.backend_session_id_in_events: PASS - webrtc_signaling.py includes session_id in incoming_chat_request emit
features_tested.frontend_session_id_passing: PASS - chat/[characterId].tsx, unified-chat.tsx, and live-chat.tsx all handle sessionId correctly
features_tested.live_chat_page: PASS - Page loads with sessionId/alertId params, makes socket connection, shows UI correctly

ui_verification.chat_tommy_page: Working - Consent modal shows, chat interface loads after acceptance
ui_verification.unified_chat_page: Working - Shows Hugo character consent modal
ui_verification.live_chat_page: Working - Shows Support Team interface, socket connects, handles no-staff-available state gracefully
